title: ST558 Homework 2
text:
Create two vectors


pre <- c(130, 128, 116, 124, 133, 134, 118, 126, 114, 127, 141, 138, 128, 140, 137, 131, 120, 128, 139, 135)
post <- c(114, 98, 113, 99, 107, 116, 113, 111, 119, 117, 101, 119, 130, 122, 106, 106, 124, 102, 117, 113)


Create subject name and assign name to vectors


subject_names <- paste("Subject", 1:20, sep = "_")

names(pre) <- subject_names
names(post) <- subject_names

pre

 Subject_1  Subject_2  Subject_3  Subject_4  Subject_5  Subject_6  Subject_7 
       130        128        116        124        133        134        118 
 Subject_8  Subject_9 Subject_10 Subject_11 Subject_12 Subject_13 Subject_14 
       126        114        127        141        138        128        140 
Subject_15 Subject_16 Subject_17 Subject_18 Subject_19 Subject_20 
       137        131        120        128        139        135 

post

 Subject_1  Subject_2  Subject_3  Subject_4  Subject_5  Subject_6  Subject_7 
       114         98        113         99        107        116        113 
 Subject_8  Subject_9 Subject_10 Subject_11 Subject_12 Subject_13 Subject_14 
       111        119        117        101        119        130        122 
Subject_15 Subject_16 Subject_17 Subject_18 Subject_19 Subject_20 
       106        106        124        102        117        113 



Calculate change in blood pressure


change <- pre - post

change

 Subject_1  Subject_2  Subject_3  Subject_4  Subject_5  Subject_6  Subject_7 
        16         30          3         25         26         18          5 
 Subject_8  Subject_9 Subject_10 Subject_11 Subject_12 Subject_13 Subject_14 
        15         -5         10         40         19         -2         18 
Subject_15 Subject_16 Subject_17 Subject_18 Subject_19 Subject_20 
        31         25         -4         26         22         22 



Calculate the average decrease


mean(change)

[1] 17



Indices of patients with a positive change


which(change>0)

 Subject_1  Subject_2  Subject_3  Subject_4  Subject_5  Subject_6  Subject_7 
         1          2          3          4          5          6          7 
 Subject_8 Subject_10 Subject_11 Subject_12 Subject_14 Subject_15 Subject_16 
         8         10         11         12         14         15         16 
Subject_18 Subject_19 Subject_20 
        18         19         20 



Subject the vector to keep only positive changes


positive_change <- change[which(change>0)]

positive_change

 Subject_1  Subject_2  Subject_3  Subject_4  Subject_5  Subject_6  Subject_7 
        16         30          3         25         26         18          5 
 Subject_8 Subject_10 Subject_11 Subject_12 Subject_14 Subject_15 Subject_16 
        15         10         40         19         18         31         25 
Subject_18 Subject_19 Subject_20 
        26         22         22 



Calculate the average decrease for positive changes only


mean(positive_change)

[1] 20.64706






Create a data frame


bp_df <- data.frame(
                 patient = subject_names, 
                 pre_bp = pre,
                 post_bp = post, 
                 diff_bp = pre - post)


Return row where diff_bp column is negative


bp_df[bp_df$diff_bp<0,]

              patient pre_bp post_bp diff_bp
Subject_9   Subject_9    114     119      -5
Subject_13 Subject_13    128     130      -2
Subject_17 Subject_17    120     124      -4



Return row where diff_bp column is negative


bp_df$new <- bp_df$post_bp < 120


Print the data frame


knitr::kable(bp_df)

Create a new data frame with this data in it that is similar to the data frame from task 2


x<-c(138, 135, 147, 117, 152, 134, 114, 121, 131, 130)
y<-c(105, 136, 123, 130, 134, 143, 135, 139, 120, 124)
subject_names2 <- paste("Subject", 1:10, sep = "_")

OthExp_df<-data.frame(pre_bp=x,post_bp=y,patient=subject_names2,diff_bp=x-y)


Now create and store a list with two elements


Exp_list<-list(treatment=bp_df,placebo=OthExp_df)


Access the first list element using three different types of syntax


Exp_list[1]

$treatment
              patient pre_bp post_bp diff_bp   new

              patient pre_bp post_bp diff_bp   new
Subject_1   Subject_1    130     114      16  TRUE
Subject_2   Subject_2    128      98      30  TRUE
Subject_3   Subject_3    116     113       3  TRUE
Subject_4   Subject_4    124      99      25  TRUE
Subject_5   Subject_5    133     107      26  TRUE

Subject_12 Subject_12    138     119      19  TRUE

Subject_18 Subject_18    128     102      26  TRUE
Subject_19 Subject_19    139     117      22  TRUE
Subject_20 Subject_20    135     113      22  TRUE



In one line, access the placebo data frame, pre_bp column.


Exp_list[[2]][[1]]

 [1] 138 135 147 117 152 134 114 121 131 130






Create a new column in each data frame from above called status


Exp_list$treatment$status<-character(20)
Exp_list$placebo$status<-character(10)


For the non-placebo data frame (within the list), create a for loop and use if/then/else logic to create the status column’s values.


for (i in 1:20) {
  if (Exp_list$treatment$post_bp[i] <= 120) {
    Exp_list$treatment$status[i] <- "optimal"
  } else if (Exp_list$treatment$post_bp[i] > 120 & Exp_list$treatment$post_bp[i] <= 130) {
    Exp_list$treatment$status[i] <- "borderline"
  } else if (Exp_list$treatment$post_bp[i] > 130) {
    Exp_list$treatment$status[i] <- "high"
  } else {
    Exp_list$treatment$status[i] <- 'error'
  }
}


Repeat for the placebo data frame (within the list).


for (i in 1:10) {
  if (Exp_list$placebo$post_bp[i] <= 120) {
    Exp_list$placebo$status[i] <- "optimal"
  } else if (Exp_list$placebo$post_bp[i] > 120 & Exp_list$placebo$post_bp[i] <= 130) {
    Exp_list$placebo$status[i] <- "borderline"
  } else if (Exp_list$placebo$post_bp[i] > 130) {
    Exp_list$placebo$status[i] <- "high"
  } else {
    Exp_list$placebo$status[i] <- 'error'
  }
}





Write a function for data summary


summary_bp<-function(data_list,stats='mean'){
  
  my_fun <- get(stats)
  
  treatment_pre  <- my_fun(data_list$treatment$pre_bp)
  treatment_post <- my_fun(data_list$treatment$post_bp)
  treatment_diff <- my_fun(data_list$treatment$diff_bp)
  placebo_pre  <- my_fun(data_list$placebo$pre_bp)
  placebo_post <- my_fun(data_list$placebo$post_bp)
  placebo_diff <- my_fun(data_list$placebo$diff_bp)
  
  out<-c(treatment_pre,treatment_post,treatment_diff,
         placebo_pre,placebo_post,placebo_diff)
  
  names(out)<-c(paste('pre treatment blood pressure',stats),
                paste('post treatment blood pressure' ,stats),
                paste('difference between treatment blood pressure',stats) ,
                paste('pre placebo blood pressure',stats),
                paste('post placebo blood pressure',stats) ,
                paste('difference between placebo blood pressure',stats ))
  return(out)
}


Use the function


summary_bp(Exp_list)

               pre treatment blood pressure mean 
                                          129.35 
              post treatment blood pressure mean 
                                          112.35 
difference between treatment blood pressure mean 
                                           17.00 
                 pre placebo blood pressure mean 
                                          131.90 
                post placebo blood pressure mean 
                                          128.90 
  difference between placebo blood pressure mean 
                                            3.00 

summary_bp(Exp_list,stats='var')

               pre treatment blood pressure var 
                                       64.55526 
              post treatment blood pressure var 
                                       74.76579 
difference between treatment blood pressure var 
                                      153.68421 
                 pre placebo blood pressure var 
                                      149.87778 
                post placebo blood pressure var 
                                      124.98889 
  difference between placebo blood pressure var 
                                      341.33333 

summary_bp(Exp_list,stats='sd')

               pre treatment blood pressure sd 
                                      8.034629 
              post treatment blood pressure sd 
                                      8.646721 
difference between treatment blood pressure sd 
                                     12.396944 
                 pre placebo blood pressure sd 
                                     12.242458 
                post placebo blood pressure sd 
                                     11.179843 
  difference between placebo blood pressure sd 
                                     18.475209 

summary_bp(Exp_list,stats='min')

               pre treatment blood pressure min 
                                            114 
              post treatment blood pressure min 
                                             98 
difference between treatment blood pressure min 
                                             -5 
                 pre placebo blood pressure min 
                                            114 
                post placebo blood pressure min 
                                            105 
  difference between placebo blood pressure min 
                                            -21 

summary_bp(Exp_list,stats='max')

               pre treatment blood pressure max 
                                            141 
              post treatment blood pressure max 
                                            130 
difference between treatment blood pressure max 
                                             40 
                 pre placebo blood pressure max 
                                            152 
                post placebo blood pressure max 
                                            143 
  difference between placebo blood pressure max 
                                             33

title: ST558 Homework 2
ST558 Homework 2
text:
Write a function for data summary


summary_bp<-function(data_list,stats='mean'){
  
  my_fun <- get(stats)
  
  treatment_pre  <- my_fun(data_list$treatment$pre_bp)
  treatment_post <- my_fun(data_list$treatment$post_bp)
  treatment_diff <- my_fun(data_list$treatment$diff_bp)
  placebo_pre  <- my_fun(data_list$placebo$pre_bp)
  placebo_post <- my_fun(data_list$placebo$post_bp)
  placebo_diff <- my_fun(data_list$placebo$diff_bp)
  
  out<-c(treatment_pre,treatment_post,treatment_diff,
         placebo_pre,placebo_post,placebo_diff)
  
  names(out)<-c(paste('pre treatment blood pressure',stats),
                paste('post treatment blood pressure' ,stats),
                paste('difference between treatment blood pressure',stats) ,
                paste('pre placebo blood pressure',stats),
                paste('post placebo blood pressure',stats) ,
                paste('difference between placebo blood pressure',stats ))
  return(out)
}
